query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as count_empty, 
       COUNT(CASE WHEN icd_codes_raw IS NULL OR icd_codes_raw = '' OR icd_codes_raw = '[]' THEN 1 END) as count_no_codes
FROM drug_entries
WHERE indication IS NOT NULL AND indication != ''
